olsen-v-finansiel-stabilitet-2025-01-25.lesson: Pro-se fake citations still cost your client costs — flag AI drafts for mandatory citation audit.

body-by-michael-pty-ltd-and-industry-inn.lesson: Tribunals cross-check every citation — withdrawing fakes before hearing avoids adverse inferences but not the warning.

candice-dias-v-angle-auto-finance-2025-0.lesson: Pro-se AI filings are a map signal, not a firm threat; stay focused on attorney-party cases.

mavundla-v-mec-2025-01-08.lesson: Never delegate citation verification to juniors without review — supervising counsel pays de bonis propriis when fakes slip through.

buckeye-trust-v-pcit-2024-12-30.lesson: When counsel feeds hallucinations, even judges get burned — verify every authority before citing it back in opinions.

duarte-v-city-of-richmond-2024-12-18.lesson: Tribunal cautions against AI use set precedent — expect costs next time lawyers do the same.

hamdan-v-the-national-insurance-institut.lesson: Blaming an unnamed legal database does not shift the verification duty — the submitting lawyer owns every citation.

john-coulsto-et-al-v-elliott-2024-12-10.lesson: Repealed-law claims from AI drafts collapse instantly — always confirm statutes are still in force before filing.

crypto-open-patent-alliance-v-wright-1-2.lesson: Doubling down on fake citations in appeal papers turns a litigation loss into a GBP 100K costs order.

wikeley-v-kea-investments-ltd-2024-11-21.lesson: Undisclosed AI use triggers referral to guidance even without sanctions — always disclose the tool when citations fail.

monster-energy-company-v-pacific-smoke-i.lesson: IP boards now flag AI hallucinations on sight — unverified citations erase your argument before the merits.

kaur-v-rmit-2024-11-11.lesson: Appellate courts now silently strip fake citations from reasons — the record memorializes the failure anyway.

carb-188903m-2024-calgary-assessment-rev.lesson: Assessment boards escalate repeat AI fakes to the General Chair — three unverifiable cites is one too many.

rajabi-c-lassalle-2024-11-01.lesson: French-language tribunals catch fake CanLII cites just as fast — jurisdiction is no shield.

anonymous-spanish-lawyer-2024-09-09.lesson: Nineteen fake cites to the Constitutional Court = apercibimiento plus bar referral — blaming the database does not help.

atsj-na-382024-2024-09-04.lesson: ChatGPT cited a Colombian statute as Spanish law — never let a consumer chatbot quote foreign codes into your brief.

in-re-dayal-2024-08-27.lesson: LEAP's embedded AI module is not a research tool — two-year supervision and a ban on solo practice followed one unverified list.

nitzan-v-adar-baemakim-properties-ltd-20.lesson: Claiming you wrote the fake summaries yourself is worse than blaming AI — judges escalate for misrepresenting origin.

industria-de-diseño-textil-sa-v-sara-gha.lesson: Even a warning becomes public record — trademark boards now name-and-shame fake citations in routine oppositions.
